description: Postgres service instance health monitoring: connections, transactions, cache, locks, WAL, checkpoints, table stats, and VM resources. Select any Tanzu Postgres service instance to monitor.

targets.expr: sum(rate(pg_stat_database_blks_hit{datname="postgres", exported_job="postgres-instance", deployment=~"$instance"}[5m])) / (sum(rate(pg_stat_database_blks_hit{datname="postgres", exported_job="postgres-instance", deployment=~"$instance"}[5m])) + sum(rate(pg_stat_database_blks_read{datname="postgres", exported_job="postgres-instance", deployment=~"$instance"}[5m])))

panels.description: Active connections grouped by state (active, idle, idle in transaction, etc.).
panels.title: Connections by State

panels.description: Current backend connections vs configured max_connections. The red dashed line shows the limit.
panels.title: Connections vs Max

panels.description: Rate of committed vs rolled-back transactions.
panels.title: Transaction Rate (Commit vs Rollback)

panels.description: Buffer cache hit ratio over time. Values above 95% (green line) indicate healthy caching.

targets.expr: sum(rate(pg_stat_database_blks_hit{datname="postgres", exported_job="postgres-instance", deployment=~"$instance"}[5m])) / (sum(rate(pg_stat_database_blks_hit{datname="postgres", exported_job="postgres-instance", deployment=~"$instance"}[5m])) + sum(rate(pg_stat_database_blks_read{datname="postgres", exported_job="postgres-instance", deployment=~"$instance"}[5m])))

panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio

panels.description: Rate of tuple operations: fetched, inserted, updated, and deleted.
panels.title: Tuple Operations/s

panels.description: Rate of temporary file creation and bytes written. High values may indicate insufficient work_mem.
panels.title: Temp Files & Bytes

panels.description: Locks held by mode (AccessShareLock, RowExclusiveLock, etc.), stacked.
panels.title: Locks by Mode

panels.description: Maximum transaction duration by backend state. Long-running transactions can cause table bloat and lock contention.
panels.title: Max Transaction Duration

panels.description: Rate of timed and requested checkpoints, plus bgwriter buffer activity.
panels.title: Checkpoint Rate & Bgwriter

panels.description: CPU utilization (user + system) for Postgres VM instances.
panels.title: CPU %

panels.description: Memory utilization for Postgres VM instances.
panels.title: Memory %

panels.description: Persistent and ephemeral disk utilization for Postgres VM instances.
panels.title: Disk %

panels.description: Tables with the most dead tuples, indicating a need for vacuum. High dead tuple counts cause table bloat.
panels.title: Dead Tuples (Vacuum Needed)

list.description: Select a Postgres service instance to filter all panels.
list.label: Instance
list.name: instance

title: Tanzu Postgres - Postgres Health
